hero.title: Build and publish a website with AI
hero.subtitle: Describe your idea — the platform generates video and a theme, composes the pages in a visual builder, and publishes your site on your subdomain. No code, no designers.
hero.note: No card · live in a couple of minutes

steps.title: How it works
steps.subtitle: Three steps from idea to a published site.

items.title: Describe the idea
items.text: Write a brief — the Studio builds a cinematic prompt, generates AI video and picks a theme for your product.

items.title: Compose the pages
items.text: A visual drag-and-drop builder with live preview and ready-made landings. No code required.

items.title: Publish
items.text: One click and the site is live on your subdomain. Edit content anytime — changes go online instantly.

features.title: Features
features.subtitle: Everything to launch a beautiful site — in one place.

items.title: AI video
items.text: Cinematic clips from a text prompt, automatically optimized to .webm with a poster.

items.title: Auto themes
items.text: The engine picks palette, fonts, radii and motion character to match your site's content.

items.title: Visual builder
items.text: A multi-page editor: sections, styles, block variants, undo/redo, mobile responsiveness.

items.title: Subdomain publishing
items.text: Your own address like your-brand.site, instant updates and live preview.

themesTeaser.title: Ready-made themes
themesTeaser.subtitle: Palette, fonts and animations are picked automatically to match your product.

finalCta.title: Launch your site today
finalCta.subtitle: Describe the idea — the platform does the rest. One-click publishing to your subdomain.
